summary: NFC RRHH feature (Option D) tested successfully. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend NFC features verified: Control Horario shows NFC fichajes, Registrar Fichaje modal has NFC tab with manual input and scan button, Employee detail has NFC management section with assign/remove functionality.
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up NFC assignments during testing. Test fichajes created via NFC method.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NFC RRHH feature fully working. 13 employees in system. Web NFC API only works on Chrome Android - manual input fallback tested and working. NFC fichajes visible in Control Horario tab with 'nfc' method indicator. Employee detail modal has NFC management section under 'Métodos de Identificación'.

backend_endpoints: PUT /api/rrhh/empleados/{id}/nfc - WORKING (assigns NFC ID to employee)
PUT /api/rrhh/empleados/{id}/nfc with empty ID - WORKING (returns 400 bad request)
DELETE /api/rrhh/empleados/{id}/nfc - WORKING (removes NFC ID from employee)
POST /api/rrhh/fichajes/nfc entrada - WORKING (creates entrada fichaje via NFC)
POST /api/rrhh/fichajes/nfc salida - WORKING (creates salida fichaje via NFC)
POST /api/rrhh/fichajes/nfc invalid - WORKING (returns 404 for unknown NFC)
GET /api/rrhh/fichajes/hoy - WORKING (shows NFC fichajes with method indicator)
frontend_features: RRHH page has 6 tabs (Empleados, Control Horario, Productividad, Documentos, Ausencias, Prenómina) - WORKING
Control Horario tab shows 'Fichajes de Hoy' table with NFC method column - WORKING
NFC fichajes display with credit card icon and 'nfc' text - WORKING
Registrar Fichaje modal has 4 method tabs (Manual, QR, NFC, Facial) - WORKING
NFC tab shows Entrada/Salida buttons for tipo selection - WORKING
NFC tab shows 'ID de Tarjeta NFC' input field with placeholder - WORKING
NFC tab shows 'Fichar' button for manual NFC input - WORKING
NFC tab shows Web NFC warning for non-Android browsers - WORKING
Employee detail modal shows 'Métodos de Identificación' section - WORKING
Employee detail shows QR, NFC, Facial badges with checkmarks - WORKING
Employee detail shows 'Gestión NFC' section - WORKING
NFC assign input with 'Asignar' button when no NFC - WORKING
NFC ID display with remove (X) button when NFC assigned - WORKING
NFC assignment updates badge to show checkmark - WORKING
NFC removal shows confirmation dialog - WORKING

nfc_feature_details.web_nfc_api: Only available on Chrome Android - fallback to manual input tested
nfc_feature_details.duplicate_prevention: 409 Conflict when assigning NFC already used by another employee
nfc_feature_details.employee_detail_ui: Shows NFC management under 'Métodos de Identificación' section
